title: NoOPHere
description: NoOpHere is a Minecraft SMP plugin designed to prevent unauthorized operator (OP) access and block abusive console commands, ensuring a secure and fair multiplayer experience for all players. 🚫🔒
body:
### **NoOpHere - Ultimate OP Protection for SMP Servers 🚫🔒**  

**NoOpHere** is a must-have security plugin for **Survival Multiplayer (SMP) servers**, ensuring that **no unauthorized player can obtain OP privileges** and preventing abuse of powerful console commands. This plugin **automatically removes OP access** and **blocks risky commands**, helping server owners maintain fair gameplay and a secure environment.  

---

## 🔥 **Key Features for SMP Servers**  

✅ **Automatic OP Removal** – Instantly removes OP from all players, even offline ones.  
👀 **Real-Time Monitoring** – Constantly scans for unauthorized OP changes.  
🚫 **Command Protection** – Blocks dangerous commands like `/op`, `/deop`, `/give`, `/tp`, `/gamemode`, etc.  
📢 **Audit Logging** – Sends alerts when someone tries to get OP access.  
⚙️ **Fully Configurable** – Customize blocked commands, alerts, and check intervals.  
🔄 **Lightweight & Efficient** – Designed for **SMP servers**, with minimal performance impact.  

---

## ⚙️ **How It Works**  

1️⃣ **Download & Install:** Place `NoOpHere.jar` into your `plugins/` folder.  
2️⃣ **Restart the Server:** The config file will be generated automatically.  
3️⃣ **Customize Settings:** Edit `config.yml` to match your server’s needs.  
4️⃣ **Stay Secure:** No more OP abuse—NoOpHere runs in the background, keeping your SMP fair and fun!  

---
## 🛠 **SMP Owners, We Want Your Feedback!**  

💡 **Got ideas for new features?** Want to see more SMP-specific improvements?  
Join our **Discord server** and share your suggestions!

Your feedback helps shape NoOpHere—let’s improve it together! 🚀
